calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Continued To Jun-28-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIAS
NOTICE OF DEMURRER AND DEMURRER TO SECOND, THIRD, AND
FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN PLAINTIFF ROBERT F. HINKS THIRD
AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Daniel Cravens, Esq. 559-421-9377 Cravens & Asociates for Plaintiff.
Cara Berrick, Esq. 415-536-3424 Ogletree Deakins for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. Cravens cites case law. Ms. Barrick responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIAS' DEMURRER TO SECOND, THIRD, AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN PLAINTIFF ROBERT F. HINKS THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Taken Under Submission. ***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After the hearing an order SUSTAINING IN PART AND OVERRULING IN PART DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO SECOND, THIRD, AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN PLAINTIFF ROBERT F. HINK'S THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT.(see scanned order for details)***

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's DEMURRER to 3RD Amended COMPLAINT.

The matter is taken off calendar. Calendaring error.

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Off calendar. The Barrick declaration does not comply with CCP 430.41. While the declaration refers to "discussions," it does not explain the "means" by which the parties met and conferred. The parties are ordered to comply with the statute. Movant's response to the Second Amended Complaint is now due by January 13, 2023.
